'''wapuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xyloglucoside|xyloglucoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xyloglucoside|xyloglucoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wapuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæpiyith|wæpiyith]] || [[word:wæpiyij|wæpiyij]] || [[word:wæpiyish|wæpiyish]] || [[word:wæpiyi|wæpiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapupuyuth|wapupuyuth]] || [[word:wapupuyuj|wapupuyuj]] || [[word:wapupuyush|wapupuyush]] || [[word:wapupuyu|wapupuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapuyuth|wapuyuth]] || [[word:wapuyuj|wapuyuj]] || [[word:wapuyush|wapuyush]] || [[word:wapuyu|wapuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapufyuth|wapufyuth]] || [[word:wapufyuj|wapufyuj]] || [[word:wapufyush|wapufyush]] || [[word:wapufyuf|wapufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wapuyuthu|wapuyuthu]] || [[word:wapuyuju|wapuyuju]] || [[word:wapuyushu|wapuyushu]] || [[word:wapuyuku|wapuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wapuyuth|wapuyuth]] || [[word:wapuyuj|wapuyuj]] || [[word:wapuyush|wapuyush]] || [[word:wapuyu|wapuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wapuyuthul|wapuyuthul]] || [[word:wapuyujul|wapuyujul]] || [[word:wapuyushul|wapuyushul]] || [[word:wapuyukul|wapuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wapuyuthuthu|wapuyuthuthu]] || [[word:wapuyujuju|wapuyujuju]] || [[word:wapuyushushu|wapuyushushu]] || [[word:wapuyuku|wapuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wapuyuthun|wapuyuthun]] || [[word:wapuyujun|wapuyujun]] || [[word:wapuyushun|wapuyushun]] || [[word:wapuyukun|wapuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wapuyuthuoro|wapuyuthuoro]] || [[word:wapuyujuoro|wapuyujuoro]] || [[word:wapuyushuoro|wapuyushuoro]] || [[word:wapuyukuoro|wapuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
